alignments.json_text: You want a table for two at 7.30, is that right?
alignments.wiki_text: You want a table for two at 7:30, is that right?
alignments.proposed_text: You want a table for two at 7.30, is that right?

alignments.json_text: Yes, and I'm prepared to spend $6,700.
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] Yes, and I am prepared to spend six to seven hundred dollars.
alignments.proposed_text: [accented] Yes, and I am prepared to spend six to seven hundred dollars.
Great, what's your name?
[accented] Philippe.
And your telephone number?
[accented] I am at 3-2-2-7-7-2-7.

alignments.json_text: And you want a bottle of champagne on the table?
alignments.wiki_text: And you want a... bottle of, uh, champagne on the table?
alignments.proposed_text: And you want a... bottle of, uh, champagne on the table?

alignments.json_text: Yes, and I will need eel prepared.
alignments.proposed_text: Yes, and I will need eel prepared.

alignments.json_text: I would like to read mystery novels while eating, if those can be brought to me.
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] Yes, and I will need, uhh... eel prepared. I would like to read mystery novels while eating... if those can be brought to me.
alignments.proposed_text: [accented] Yes, and I will need, uhh... eel prepared. I would like to read mystery novels while eating... if those can be brought to me.

alignments.json_text: This is, do you want me to go over some of the items on our menu because we don't have anything you've mentioned so far?
alignments.wiki_text: This is... do you want me to go over some of the items on our menu? Because we don't have anything you've mentioned so far.
alignments.proposed_text: This is, do you want me to go over some of the items on our menu because we don't have anything you've mentioned so far?
[accented] I need, uhh...

alignments.json_text: Just let me know what you need. I've got a table for...
alignments.wiki_text: Just let me know what you need. I've got a table for two at 7:30...
alignments.proposed_text: Just let me know what you need. I've got a table for two at 7:30...

alignments.json_text: I need the finest grapes, hand-fed to me and my wife.
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] I need the finest grapes hand-fed to me, and my wife.
alignments.proposed_text: [accented] I need the finest grapes hand-fed to me, and my wife.
[laughs] This is a joke, right?

alignments.json_text: Ma'am, I thought a restaurant of your caliber would be...
alignments.wiki_text: [sighs] [accented] Ma'am, I thought, uh... a restaurant of your caliber would be, uhh...
alignments.proposed_text: [sighs] [accented] Ma'am, I thought, uh... a restaurant of your caliber would be, uhh...

alignments.wiki_text: We don't... we don't have... Fuji grapes.
alignments.proposed_text: We don't... we don't have... Fuji grapes.
Flame grapes will do.
That's...

alignments.json_text: to be placed in my mouth.
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] Flame grapes will do. They are to be placed in my mouth.
alignments.proposed_text: [accented] Flame grapes will do. They are to be placed in my mouth.
Did you tape that?
Yeah.
